source_basis: Fixture figure/table audit; no data files reviewed.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact follows the shared book artifact schema.
what_remains_uncertain: Caption, axis, and data provenance require source files or data.
user_verification_needed: Verify data provenance, labels, and rights before using the figure or table.

figure_table_checks.claim_supported: The figure is meant to support a comparative claim.
figure_table_checks.data_provenance: No dataset or extraction table supplied.
figure_table_checks.repair_action: Provide data source, caption basis, and rights status.
